name: 易混词辨析 · 第一辑（动词 / 数量 / 介词）
desc: 中考高频易混词一网打尽：affect/effect、rise/raise、lie/lay、borrow/lend、fewer/less、between/among、beside/besides、across/through。配对记义 + 句境选词。免费档，人人可练。

m1: n. 影响 / 效果（名词，have an effect on）
v. 上升 / 升起（不及物，rose-risen，无宾语）
v. 举起 / 筹集 / 提高（及物，raised，要宾语）
v. 躺 / 位于（不及物，lie-lay-lain，无宾语）
v. 放置 / 下蛋（及物，laid-laid，要宾语）
m2: v. 借入（向别人把东西借进来）borrow … from
v. 借出（把东西借给别人）lend sb sth
更少（+ 可数名词复数）
介词：在（三者或以上）之中
m3: n. 建议（不可数，a piece of advice）
v. 建议（advise sb to do）
介词 / 副词：除……之外（还有）；而且
介词：穿过（从内部 / 三维空间穿越）

m4.q: Could you ___ me your bike? Mine is broken.
m4.why: 把车借给我=借出 → lend sb sth；borrow 是“借入”方向相反；borrowed/lent 是过去式，情态动词 could 后须用动词原形。

m4.q: Staying up late will badly ___ your health.
m4.why: “影响”作动词用 affect；effect 是名词，不能作谓语动词。

m4.q: The new study method has a good ___ on our grades.
m4.why: have a good effect on=对……有好效果，effect 名词；affect 是动词。

m4.q: There is ___ traffic on the road on Sundays than on weekdays.
m4.why: traffic 不可数、且 than 要用比较级 → less；fewer 修饰可数名词，fewest/least 是最高级不能与 than 连用。

m4.q: I made ___ mistakes in this test than in the last one.
m4.why: mistakes 可数复数 → fewer；less 修饰不可数。

m4.q: You look tired. Please ___ down on the sofa and have a rest.
m4.why: “躺下”=lie（不及物，无宾语）；lay 是“放置”（及物）需带宾语。

m5.q: He ___ his hand high to answer the teacher's question.
m5.why: “举手”=raise（及物，带宾语 hand）→ raised；rise 不及物不能带宾语。

m5.q: The price of houses has ___ sharply over the past few years.
m5.why: 价格“上涨”=rise（不及物）现在完成 has risen；raise 及物需宾语，此处无宾语。

m5.q: What's the difference ___ the two English words?
m5.why: 两者(two words)之间 → between；among 用于三者及以上。

m5.q: The teacher stood ___ all her students and smiled.
m5.why: 在“所有学生”(三者以上)之中 → among；between 用于两者。

m5.q: ___ Chinese and English, she can also speak a little Japanese.
m5.why: “除……之外（还有）”→ Besides；beside 是“在旁边”。

m5.q: Be careful when you walk ___ the busy street to the other side.
m5.why: 横过马路（平面、到对面）→ across；through 是从内部穿过。
